blurb: UK embodied-AI/self-driving scale-up. Launch coverage is anchored on parliamentary written evidence plus a checked-empty ATS status for policy roles.

publications.title: Wayve — written evidence (ACT0047)
publications.summary: Wayve's written submission to the House of Lords Communications and Digital Committee inquiry 'Scaling up: AI and creative tech' positions it as a UK embodied-AI scale-up and argues for compute access, AV regulatory clarity and AI talent retention.

notes: launch_harvest 2026-06-27: Parliament URL is primary/named source but HTTP fetch returned 403/Cloudflare; status=needs_browser for full-body recapture. Roles ATS Greenhouse board wayve verified reachable with 119 jobs; status=checked_empty for relevant London policy/legal/governance roles.
